Module.Content:
<Module>

</style><style type="text/css">#button {
  display:none;
}
.imgb_vis {
  animation: imgb-animation 7s linear;
}
@keyframes imgb-animation {
  10% {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
  20% {
    transform: translateX(100px);
  }
  90% {
    transform: translateX(100px);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
}</style></head><body dir="ltr"><script async="" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-MENBM6GSNY"></script><script>function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments)}window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[],gtag("js",new Date),gtag("config","G-MENBM6GSNY")</script><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aKevbo/lumassets@39dcf72cfd3d38396758105fcd0a41ac651a0bc1/backrooms/TemplateData/UnityProgress.js"></script><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aKevbo/lumassets@39dcf72cfd3d38396758105fcd0a41ac651a0bc1/backrooms/Build/UnityLoader.js"></script><script>
      var gameInstance = UnityLoader.instantiate(
        "gameContainer",
        "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aKevbo/lumassets@39dcf72cfd3d38396758105fcd0a41ac651a0bc1/backrooms/Build/WebGL.json",
        { onProgress: UnityProgress }
      );
    </script>
    <div class="webgl-content">
      <div id="gameContainer" style="width: 100vw; height: 100vh; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; border: 0px; position: relative; background: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aKevbo/lumassets@39dcf72cfd3d38396758105fcd0a41ac651a0bc1/backrooms/Build/WebGL.jpg") center center / cover;"><canvas id="#canvas" style="cursor: url("data:image/cur;base64,"), default;" width="1877" height="926"></canvas><div class="logo Dark" style="display: none;"></div><div class="progress Dark" style="display: none;"><div class="empty" style="width: 0%;"></div><div class="full" style="width: 100%;"></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <script src=""></script>
  



</script><style>
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0;
}
</style><link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aKevbo/lumassets@39dcf72cfd3d38396758105fcd0a41ac651a0bc1/backrooms/TemplateData/style.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta content="text/html; charset=utf-8" http-equiv="Content-Type">
    <title>Backrooms</title>
    

<style>
  #ad-container {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: min(728px, calc(100% - 20px));
    height: 90px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.90);
    display: none;
    z-index: 99999;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 -2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
    transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out;
  }

  #ad-container.hidden { transform: translate(-50%, 100%); }

  #ad-iframe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 745px;
    height: 90px;
    border: 0;
  }

  /* Kapatma Butonu: Başlangıçta Üst Orta */
  #close-ad {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.9);
    transform-origin: center;
    background: #ff4d4d;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: bold;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    opacity: 0.9;
    z-index: 100000;
    white-space: nowrap;
    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
  }

  /* Aktifleştiğinde Sağ Üst Köşe Stili */
  #close-ad.enabled {
    cursor: pointer;
    opacity: 1;
    background: #ff1a1a;
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px #ff4d4d;
    animation: glow-pulse 1.5s infinite alternate;
    /* Sağ üst konumu */
    top: 5px;
    right: 5px;
    left: auto;
    transform: scale(0.85);
  }

  @keyframes glow-pulse {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 5px #ff4d4d; }
    to { box-shadow: 0 0 20px #ff4d4d; opacity: 0.9; }
  }

  #close-ad::before {
    content: '✕';
    margin-right: 2px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 440px) {
    #ad-container { width: calc(100% - 12px); }
    #ad-iframe { width: 728px; }
  }
</style>

<div id="ad-container" aria-hidden="true">
  <iframe id="ad-iframe" src="https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwO0_-Mbrs-AoE1MqbBxyaIzK385M7xGx4jDkq-FDsbR9wNcqft1m3554Np5XINfbRViw/exec" scrolling="no" frameborder="0" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-same-origin"></iframe>
  <button id="close-ad" disabled>Wait (12)</button>
</div>

<script>
  (function () {
    const showDelay = 2000; 
    const countdownStart = 12; 
    const reappearDelay = 150000; // 2.5 Dakika
    const adContainer = document.getElementById('ad-container');
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById('close-ad');

    // Rastgelelik kaldırıldı, sadece sağ üst pozisyonu eklendi
    function setTopRight() {
      closeBtn.style.top = '5px';
      closeBtn.style.right = '5px';
      closeBtn.style.left = 'auto';
      closeBtn.style.transform = 'scale(0.85)';
    }

    function resetToCenter() {
      closeBtn.style.top = '0';
      closeBtn.style.left = '50%';
      closeBtn.style.right = 'auto';
      closeBtn.style.bottom = 'auto';
      closeBtn.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) scale(0.9)';
    }

    function showAd() {
      resetToCenter();
      adContainer.style.display = 'block';
      adContainer.classList.remove('hidden');
      
      let timeLeft = countdownStart;
      closeBtn.disabled = true;
      closeBtn.classList.remove('enabled');
      closeBtn.textContent = `Wait (${timeLeft})`;

      const t = setInterval(() => {
        timeLeft--;
        if (timeLeft > 0) {
          closeBtn.textContent = `Wait (${timeLeft})`;
        } else {
          clearInterval(t);
          closeBtn.disabled = false;
          closeBtn.textContent = ''; 
          setTopRight(); // Artık her zaman sağ üste gider
          closeBtn.classList.add('enabled'); 
        }
      }, 1000);
    }

    setTimeout(showAd, showDelay);

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (closeBtn.disabled) return;
      adContainer.classList.add('hidden');
      setTimeout(showAd, reappearDelay);
    });
  })();
</script>
    
    
  <script>
